title: V-Model traceability — validation-rules catalog schema
description: Validates the shape of validation-rules.catalog.json. The catalog enumerates every cross-artifact traceability rule from TARGET_ARCHITECTURE §7: reference integrity, completeness, cycle, retrofit, cascade. JSON Schema alone cannot enforce these rules because they span multiple documents; they are consumed at runtime by the traceability validator tool. Rules overlapping with per-artifact schema enforcement carry overlaps_with_schema: true.

version.description: Monotonic integer version of the catalog. Bumped when rules are added, removed, or materially revised.

category_enum.description: Rule family per TARGET §7. Drives the ID code (REF / COMP / CYCLE / RETRO / QB) and typically the implementation strategy in the validator tool.

severity_enum.description: Single value today: every traceability rule is an error (uniform high rigor — TARGET §3 principle 3). Enum form leaves room to add warning/info tiers later without a breaking change.

scope_kind_enum.description: Position in the scope tree the rule fires on. root = exactly one (the whole product). non_leaf = root or branch (holds Requirements, Architecture, TestSpec). leaf = where subdivision stops (holds Detailed Design, TestSpec).

id.description: Rule id. Pattern: TRV-<CATEGORY-CODE>-<NNN>. Category codes: REF (reference_integrity), COMP (completeness), CYCLE (cycle), RETRO (retrofit), QB (cascade/Quality Bar).

description.description: One-paragraph prose statement of the rule. Readable out of context; includes enough detail for a validator implementer to code against it without re-reading TARGET §7.

applies_to_links.description: Link types the rule ranges over. Used by reference_integrity and cycle rules.

applies_to_artifact_types.description: Artifact types the rule fires on.

applies_to_scope_kind.description: Scope-tree position the rule fires on.

overlaps_with_schema.description: True when the rule is also enforced (partially or fully) by a per-artifact JSON Schema. The catalog keeps the rule listed to document the cross-artifact principle regardless of local schema enforcement.

deferred_until.description: When a rule cannot be enforced yet (missing dependency), name the gate that unblocks it. Absent when the rule is enforceable today.

note.description: Free-text addendum — typically points at the per-artifact schemas that share enforcement or at TARGET sections that source the rule.
